title: Architect WorldCup LLM research dossier
description: Frozen, committed research dossier for one knockout round. Phase 1 (web search enabled) writes it; Phase 2 (no tools) reads only this. Its commit, before the round's first kickoff, is the leakage proof, and it is the reproducibility anchor for Predictions B and C, which are not bit-reproducible.

round.description: Target knockout round this dossier informs.

as_of_date.description: Cutoff: the dossier holds nothing dated after this, the day before the round kicks off.

committed_at.description: Git commit time of the dossier, the before-kickoff leakage proof. Null until committed.

git_sha.description: Git commit sha of the code that produced the dossier.

model_version.description: Version tag of the LLM analyst layer.

provenance.description: Research-call provenance: model, effort, web search tool version, allow-list, max_uses, retrieved_at.

factors.description: Findings organised into the fixed factor taxonomy, each entry carrying its source tier.

factorEntries.description: Retrieved facts for one factor. May be empty, which forces that factor to score zero as insufficient evidence.

claim.description: The retrieved fact, in plain language.

source.description: Where the fact came from: an outlet or URL. No betting or prediction-market sources by design.

source_tier.description: Source reputability tier: 1 most reputable, 3 least, anonymous and open-edit excluded entirely.

team.description: Team the fact concerns, if specific to one side.

meeting_date.description: For a historical head-to-head fact, the date the two teams met. The quarantine gate preserves a head-to-head between the fixture teams only if this is strictly before the cutoff; a missing or on-or-after-cutoff date is a leak and fails the gate.

retrieved_at.description: When the fact was retrieved, for provenance.
